title: JavaScript block fails to access uploader files
symptom: When triggering the workflow in the workflow editor, a TypeError occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'files')'. This prevents the workflow from executing correctly.
applies_when: Using a JavaScript code block in the workflow editor
not_this_if: Workflow runs successfully in preview mode
Error does not occur in production environment
root_cause: The JavaScript code block in the workflow editor runs in an iframe, which changes the context of the `document` variable. As a result, the code cannot access the file uploader elements correctly, leading to a null reference error.
fix_steps: Replace `document` with `wwLib.getFrontDocument()` in your JavaScript code.
Test the workflow again in the workflow editor.
agent_instruction: Update the JavaScript code to use `wwLib.getFrontDocument()` for accessing the uploader files.
